[[Kiel Charny]]'s '''[[flier]]''' was a flashy vehicle he rode between the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] camp and the battlefields of [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]].

==Appearances==
*[[Jedi vs. Sith 3|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 3]] {{1st}}
